# Marteso — ASO Platform for Mobile Teams

> Marteso is an App Store Optimization (ASO) platform by Fringelo Group that helps mobile teams grow organic downloads on the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.

## What Marteso does

Marteso provides tools for:
- **Keyword Research**: Discover high-volume, low-competition keywords across 180+ countries and all app categories. Each keyword is scored by search volume (0–100) and difficulty (Easy / Medium / Hard).
- **Rank Tracking**: Monitor keyword positions daily on the App Store and Google Play. Supports 90-day historical charts and instant alerts for rank changes.
- **AI Metadata Optimizer**: AI-assisted suggestions for app titles, subtitles, and descriptions. Real-time character counts, keyword density checks, and multi-locale support.
- **Competitor Analysis**: Track any competitor app's keyword strategy, metadata changes, ratings, and reviews. Includes keyword gap reports.
- **Review Management**: Unified inbox for reviews from all storefronts. AI sentiment analysis, topic categorization, and in-dashboard response.
- **A/B Testing**: Run icon, screenshot, and description experiments on the App Store. Statistical significance reporting and automatic winner detection.

## Pricing

- **Starter** (free forever): 1 app, 50 keywords tracked, daily rank updates, 3 competitor apps, review inbox
- **Pro** (€49/app/month, or €39 billed annually): Unlimited apps, 500 keywords, AI metadata optimizer, unlimited competitors, A/B testing, weekly email reports, Slack notifications
- **Agency** (custom pricing): Everything in Pro + white-label reports, client workspace management, API access, dedicated account manager

## Company

- Product: Marteso
- Parent company: Fringelo Group
- Website: https://marteso.com
- App: https://marteso.com/app/
- Docs: https://marteso.com/docs
- Contact: hello@fringelo.com

## Key facts

- 2.4M+ keywords tracked
- 180+ countries supported
- +38% average organic growth after 60 days
- Supports both iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play)
- OAuth 2.0 integration with App Store Connect and Google Play Console (read-only)
- Built by Fringelo Group, © 2026
